cover.subtitle:
한국 최초의 국가,
홍익인간의 기억.
cover.imagePrompt: Ancient Gojoseon-era illustration, 2333 BC mood. ONE Dangun-Wanggeom figure in bronze-decorated robe and head ornament, holding a bronze ritual mirror and standing in front of a stone altar (godol) atop a wooded hill. Background: pine forest, distant misty mountains, dolmen silhouette. Composition: founding ritual, mythic dignity. Color: bronze + clay-brown + deep forest green. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

outro.tip_body: 심화 시험에서는 비파형동검(초기 고조선·요령~한반도)과 세형동검(후기 고조선·한국식)을 구분해 묻는다. 위만은 '연 출신·철기·중계무역', 멸망은 BC 108년 한 무제임을 묶어서 기억할 것.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized bipa-shaped bronze dagger (bipahyeong dongeom) icon shown from a slight angle. RIGHT: a small table-style dolmen silhouette. Cream #F2EDE3 base + bronze #8B7E5A accent. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.
